mapper.sql: select e.event_id, e.gateway_id, g.external_tbox_id, g.imei as gateway_imei, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, e.fire_point_id, fp.fire_point_name, e.from_longitude, e.from_latitude, e.to_longitude, e.to_latitude, e.distance_m, e.trigger_time, e.candidate_summary, e.selected_target_type, e.selected_target_id, e.selected_external_company_id, e.selected_external_company_name, case when e.selected_target_type = 'contract_dept' then td.dept_name when e.selected_target_type = 'independent_customer' then c.customer_name end as selected_target_name, e.status, e.confirm_user_id, cu.user_name as confirm_user_name, e.confirm_time, e.visit_id, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark from fe_visit_passive_event e left join fe_gateway g on e.gateway_id = g.gateway_id left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id left join fe_fire_point fp on e.fire_point_id = fp.fire_point_id left join sys_user cu on e.confirm_user_id = cu.user_id left join sys_dept td on e.selected_target_type = 'contract_dept' and e.selected_target_id = td.dept_id left join fe_visit_customer c on e.selected_target_type = 'independent_customer' and e.selected_target_id = c.customer_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from fe_visit_passive_event where gateway_id = #{gatewayId} and status = 'pending_confirm'
mapper.insert: insert into fe_visit_passive_event ( gateway_id, dept_id, fire_point_id, from_longitude, from_latitude, to_longitude, to_latitude, distance_m, trigger_time, candidate_summary, selected_target_type, selected_target_id, selected_external_company_id, selected_external_company_name, status, confirm_user_id, confirm_time, visit_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{gatewayId}, #{deptId}, #{firePointId}, #{fromLongitude}, #{fromLatitude}, #{toLongitude}, #{toLatitude}, #{distanceM}, #{triggerTime}, #{candidateSummary}, #{selectedTargetType}, #{selectedTargetId}, #{selectedExternalCompanyId}, #{selectedExternalCompanyName}, #{status}, #{confirmUserId}, #{confirmTime}, #{visitId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fe_visit_passive_event set gateway_id = #{gatewayId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, fire_point_id = #{firePointId}, from_longitude = #{fromLongitude}, from_latitude = #{fromLatitude}, to_longitude = #{toLongitude}, to_latitude = #{toLatitude}, distance_m = #{distanceM}, trigger_time = #{triggerTime}, candidate_summary = #{candidateSummary}, selected_target_type = #{selectedTargetType}, selected_target_id = #{selectedTargetId}, selected_external_company_id = #{selectedExternalCompanyId}, selected_external_company_name = #{selectedExternalCompanyName}, status = #{status}, confirm_user_id = #{confirmUserId}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, visit_id = #{visitId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where event_id = #{eventId}
